/CAL: PTC/X:THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE INFORMATION TO ADD COUNT, 3, PC 459(2), A FELONY, IS GRANTED,/FAWA/IRR/    /X:THE COURT HAS DECIDED TO EXERCISE ITS DISCRETIONARY POWER UNDER PEOPLE V, SUPERIOR COURT (ROMERO), PEOPLE V, WILLIAMS, AND PC 1385(C)(1) FOR THE FOLLOWING REASONS:/X:THENATURE OF THE CURRENT OFFENSE IS LESS SERIOUS THAN OTHER FELONIES;/X:THECURRENT OFFENSE IS NOT A VIOLENT OR SERIOUS FELONY ;/X:THERE WAS NO INJURYOR THREAT OF INJURY TO ANY PERSON;/X:THERE WAS NO WEAPON USED IN THE CURRENT OFFENSE;/X:THE AMOUNT OF MONETARY LOSS OR PROPERTY DAMAGE WAS SMALL OR$ 0;/ /X:THE DEFENDANT'S STRIKE PRIOR(S) IS OR ARE 23 YEARS OLD AND IS ORARE REMOTE IN TIME,/X:THE COURT FINDS, IN LIGHT OF THE NATURE AND CIRCUMSTANCES OF THIS CASE AND THE DEFENDANT'S BACKGROUND, THAT IMPOSITION OF A SENTENCE UNDER THE STRIKE PROVISION WOULD BE UNJUST OR UNWARRANTED,/TEXT:DEFTADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:   3/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 03-01-17/ARBUCKLE/REMA/TWS/VD: 02-22-17/CONTD: RECEIPT OF PSR ON 03-01-17/DAWF/CONTD: SENTENCING ON 03-17-17/DOP/
